description: The Clan Sacco-Bocchetti is a Camorra organization active in the northeastern suburbs of Naples, specifically in the San Pietro a Patierno and Secondigliano districts. It was named after Gennaro Sacco and Gaetano Bocchetti, the latter being a proponent of the Secondigliano Alliance. Gennaro Sacco was killed in a Camorra attack in 2009, and Mario Bocchetti was arrested in 2017. The clan is involved in drug trafficking and extortion.
